headline: Jim Cramer on MasTec: “It’s Such a Great One for the Data Center”
summary: MasTec, Inc. (NYSE:MTZ) was one of the stocks on Jim Cramer’s radar as he highlighted AI winners to buy for 2026. Noting that the stock has risen over the past few weeks, a caller asked how much “runway” it has left. Cramer said: We had Mr. Mas on when we did the University of Miami […]

headline: We're still in the mid-cycle phase of a bull market, says Invesco's Brian Levitt
summary: Brian Levitt, Invesco chief global market strategist, joins 'Squawk Box' to discuss the latest market trends, state of the economy, what to expect from the April jobs reports, and more.
